feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Community
feed.subtitle: SAP Community Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: C_TS4FI_2601 SAP Certified - SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition, Financial Accounting
entry.content: The presentation of the exam is a system-based evaluation. Last week I took the exam C_TS4FI_2601 SAP Certified - SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition, Financial Accounting, and I failed it. Do you know if the exam is the same for the next attempt or does it change? Someone who has taken it, could you please share your experience with me? Thank you.

entry.title: In SAP community I'm unable to format my 'comments' in responses.
entry.content:
Detailed Description:
I have posted in both the SAP user community section and in the SAP partner community an issue I was encountering for a customer.  I have received responses from contributors, but when I attempted to respond to these, I am unable to format comments in responses.  That is, the comment section is one long text string and does not give me the ability to enter paragraphs or force a next line entry.
Can this be checked please.  Is it a permissions issue?
 
Steps to Reproduce:
Please see the example below
SAP user community post
CLM - Contract and Lease Management Migration in P... - SAP Community
You can see my comment response on this one, where it's come through as one long string of text.
The contributor does not seem to have this problem as their response back is formatted ok.
 
Thanks
Sonya

entry.title: express document update was terminated received from author
entry.content:
hello experts 

i created value contract and go to display but this pop-up comes (express document update was terminated received from author ) and automatically value contract changed customer number and material changed same thing was happen when i was creating return order process literally i was working for one weak to now exact root of error i was failing again and again but i cant get the right path to solve this error.

SAP community is the last hope. 

please correct me to solve the error so i keep continuing my practice.

thanks and regards, 

vishal

entry.title: How to fix this error in Supplier invoice "Tax events could not be determined" in SAP byd
entry.content: I am facing this error while recording a supplier invoice. The error is for line 2 in below screenshot. I would appreciate if someone can help me with the navigations steps to check. Thanks.

entry.title: Mb51 currency
entry.content: In the MB51 report, amounts are shown in my local currency, which is Egyptian pounds. However, since POs can be in other currencies (like dollars or euros), is there a way to display the receiving amounts in the original PO currency? I'd like to see both the PO currency and the local currency for comparison so that I can properly track and compare the received amounts.

entry.title: Fetch Production Order after reading QM Notification 'Reference No' (QM01) in SAP Public Cloud
entry.content:
In SAP Public Cloud 'Create Quality Notification' for Q3, what would be the method to:

  • Read Serial Number from 'NOTIFICATIONEXTREFERENCENUMBER'
  • Fetch Production Order via 'I_SERIALNUMBERMANUFACTURINGORD' and
  • Update QM notification

Unable to find related BADI.

entry.title: Windows patch level 17 version is needed
entry.content:
When using the standard BAPI "BAPI_ACC_DOCUMENT_POST" on Linux patch level 17, a decimal conversion syntax error occurs.

The same logic works correctly on both Windows patch level 7 and 18, but this error only happens on Linux patch level 17. I need to implement this on the Windows version to explain the issue to the team.

For this reason, I would like to request the Windows x86 patch level 17 version. Is it possible to download this version?

entry.title: CO_PRODUCT AFTER WORK ORDER ISSUING
entry.content:
Hi gurus,

we have use co-product in work orders. however here is the problem, the clients want to add co_product into the work order when the material is going to post. But after the work order is issuing, the reservation of the work order can't add material that movement type is 101. Right now they using 531 into the storage, but becasuse of the 531, the material can't get the right cost.

Does anyone have any suggestions?

entry.title: Improve dark mode to brighten dark text on dark background?
entry.content:
I have started a discussion right now with @Lakshmipathi about posts in dark text which I can't see well with the official Dark Mode I have activated, here: Solved: Scheduling of background jobs in production system... - SAP Community.

Is it possible to improve the rendering of dark text in dark mode?

I'm continuing the discussion here, and this is the history:

  • Sandra_Rossi (SR): Hi Lakshmipathi, for information, because I'm using the Dark mode, I can never read easily your posts (of what I read, you're the only one in that case), the text appears black on black. Of course, I will inform SAP Community, but maybe you can check the HTML you are generating. Screenshots:
  • Lakshmipathi (L): Hi Sandra_Rossi   - that is really surprising to note.  Wherever my suggestion is going to be lengthy, I used to type in a notepad and copy paste from there.  I am not comfortable typing directly as it is not user friendly.   Can you please confirm with any of my other suggestions example this one or this one   where I typed directly in the box.
  • SR: Windows Notepad app should be OK, it's what I do too to remove the formatting.
  • SR: What I see for the first "this one":
  • SR: For the second "this one":
  • L: From your screen shots, I can conclude that whatever I type directly in the box is appearing in white font while copy pasted from notepad is in black.

entry.title: Hi I would like to know if Dunning OPD is supported in Private Cloud?
entry.content: Hi I would like to know if Dunning OPD is supported in Private Cloud?

entry.title: Is there a way to get the list of managed tags I subscribed to ?
entry.content: When looking at my subscriptions in my SAP Community profile, I see all blogs I have subscribed to. I'm looking for a way to get only the  list of managed tags I subscribed to.

entry.title: When will the mobile verification be working again?
entry.content:
I am trying to create a free trial account in the SAP BTP Cockpit. However, during the mobile number verification step, I am encountering the following error message:

"Mobile number verification is temporarily unavailable. Please try again later."

Due to this issue, I am unable to complete the account registration process. I have attempted multiple times at different intervals, but the problem persists.

This issue is causing inconvenience as I need to access the SAP BTP trial account at the earliest for my work.

I kindly request you to look into this issue and resolve it as soon as possible, or provide an alternative way to complete the registration process.

entry.title: OData V4 Fiori Elements: "KeyPath missing at p.getItemFromContext" when selecting Value Help - Fiori
entry.content:
Hello SAP Experts,

I am facing a persistent UI5 ERROR in an OData V4 Fiori Elements application (based on ABAP RAP).

The Scenario: I have a Root Consumption View with an input Parameter. I have assigned a custom CDS Value Help (Dropdown / #XS) to this parameter. The dropdown successfully opens and displays the data in the Fiori Preview.

The Error: When the user clicks/selects an item from the dropdown list, the slection doesn't happen with the following console error in the browser:

Uncaught (in promise) Error: KeyPath missing at p.getItemFromContext

1. Value Help CDS View (Single Key, Dropdown)

@AccessControl.authorizationCheck: #NOT_REQUIRED
@EndUserText.label: 'Value Help for Parameter'
@ObjectModel.resultSet.sizeCategory: #XS  

define view entity ZI_VH_CustomValue
  as select from custom_domain_table
{
      @UI.lineItem: [{ position: 10 }]
        key cast( domain_value as abap.char(1) ) as ValueKey,

      @UI.lineItem: [{ position: 20 }]
      @Semantics.text: true
      domain_text as Description
}
where active_status = 'A'

2. The Consumption View (Short Version)

@AccessControl.authorizationCheck: #NOT_REQUIRED
@EndUserText.label: 'Main Business Object'
@Metadata.allowExtensions: true

define root view entity ZC_MainBusinessObject
  with parameters

    @EndUserText.label: 'Custom Filter Parameter'
    @Consumption.valueHelpDefinition: [{
        entity: { name: 'ZI_VH_CustomValue', element: 'ValueKey' },

        /* Explicit binding to pass the value back to the parameter */
        additionalBinding: [{
            localParameter: 'p_custom_filter',
            element: 'ValueKey',
            usage: #RESULT
        }]
    }]
    p_custom_filter : z_custom_data_element

  as select from ZI_MainBusinessObject
{
  key DocumentId,
      DocumentType,
      PostingDate
}
where PostingDate <= $session.system_date

My Questions:

  1. Is there a known limitation or missing @ui/ @Consumption annotation required to bind a Value Help strictly to a PARAMETER (rather than a standard table field) in OData V4?
  2. Why is the OData V4 framework failing to resolve the context for the selected item despite the explicit localParameter binding?

Any insights or workarounds would be highly appreciated.

Thank you!

entry.title: Onboarding IBP System into SAP Cloud ALM
entry.content:
Hello Everybody,

Could you elaborate on the steps to be performed to onboard IBP system into SAP Cloud ALM.

Any threads or blogs related to this would be appreciated.

Regards,

Hariprassad.K

entry.title: Unable to setup multiple file export from XDL, need help with the steps pls
entry.content:
I am trying to export multiple files from a single table on the basis of a grouping column in the table but even after mentioning the group column in the XDL job it throws error saying "grouping column doesnt exist".

Could anyone pls help if anyone has ever explored it?

 

Thanks and Regards,

Sandy

entry.title: SAP S/4HANA, Ontologien und digitale Souveränität – Erfahrungen mit offenen Wissensgraphen?
entry.content:
ich beschäftige mich aktuell mit der Frage, wie sich SAP‑Prozesse in mittelständischen Unternehmen (50–500 MA) durch Ontologien und Wissensgraphen optimieren lassen – insbesondere im Hinblick auf digitale Souveränität und Vendor‑Unabhängigkeit.

Ausgangspunkt ist eine Beobachtung aus mehreren Projekten: Viele Unternehmen haben SAP‑Workloads in die Cloud (AWS/Azure) verlagert, ohne die Prozesslogik vorher zu optimieren. Das führt häufig zu deutlich höheren Betriebskosten, ohne dass die zugrunde liegenden Prozessprobleme gelöst wurden.

Mit der zunehmenden Nutzung von KI‑gestützten Ansätzen (z. B. SAP Joule, SAP Graph/Knowledge Graph, Palantir Foundry) rückt jetzt die Frage in den Vordergrund, wie Prozesslogik modelliert und langfristig kontrolliert wird.

Das Beispiel Merck zeigt, dass Ontologie‑basierte Optimierung erhebliche Effizienzgewinne ermöglichen kann. Gleichzeitig entsteht bei proprietären Plattformen schnell eine starke Abhängigkeit.

Daher meine Fragen an die Community:

1. Welche Erfahrungen gibt es mit Ontologie‑basierten Ansätzen auf offenen W3C‑Standards (RDF, OWL, SPARQL) im SAP‑Umfeld? Insbesondere im Zusammenspiel mit S/4HANA, BTP, Integration Suite oder Data & Analytics.

2. Gibt es praxistaugliche Wege, Prozesslogik über offene Wissensgraphen abzubilden, ohne in proprietäre Plattformen zu geraten? Zielgruppe: mittelgroße SAP‑Landschaften.

3. Hat jemand Erfahrungen mit europäischen Anbietern wie eccenca oder ähnlichen Lösungen, die auf offenen Standards basieren?

Ich freue mich über technische Einblicke, Architektur‑Erfahrungen oder Hinweise auf Projekte, in denen offene Ontologie‑Ansätze erfolgreich eingesetzt wurden.

entry.title: Where is the “Block user” option?
entry.content: Various users are spamming the SCN and filling up my inbox. How can I block them?

entry.title: ONB2.0 - Rehired by a different company?
entry.content:
when using the “rehire with new employment” option during the onboarding process, it is possible to hire an employee through a different company than the last one (i.e., rehire them through a new company) after they were terminated?

When selecting this option, will the employee go through onboarding, or will a new profile be created with a new user ID?

entry.title: Need step by step guidance for taking S4 HANA Finance certification please
entry.content: As I am confused about where to start the S4 HANA Finance certification, please suggest the step-by-step process, such as documents to be referred to, version, how to apply for it, samples for project-based certification, etc.

entry.title: SAP BTP Trial Account Phone Verification Issue During Activation
entry.content:
Hello,

I am currently trying to activate my SAP Business Technology Platform (BTP) Trial account, but I am unable to complete the phone verification process.

I did not receive the SMS verification code, and the platform displays the following message:

“We did not send a code because you are not authorized to request phone calls. Please contact your system administrator.”

This is a personal/student trial account, so I do not have a system administrator to contact.

I have already verified that my phone number is entered correctly in international format, but the issue still persists.

Could someone please advise how to resolve this issue or indicate the appropriate support channel for trial account verification problems?

Thank you in advance for your assistance.
